name: Histological Stain Separation and DAB Quantification
description: Perform a quantitative analysis of a breast cancer tissue biopsy stained with Hematoxylin (blue nuclei) and DAB (brown Ki-67 marker) using the image ihc_tissue_sample.tif. Determine the proliferation index by calculating the DAB-positive area fraction. Separate the stains and measure the DAB-positive area, total tissue area, and DAB mean intensity. Save a results table to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/stain_separation_results.csv containing the stain/channel names, DAB area, DAB mean intensity, and DAB area fraction (as a percentage).
